content.text: How can I check if a given string record matches any of a list of potential prefixes or exact labels, even when the match occurs as part of a hierarchical path?
Does this logic assume that the dot (`.`) acts as a necessary delimiter when matching nested structures?

Yes, by checking `key + '.'`, the function requires an explicit dot to consider one matcher a parent of another record. tExample: 
def _any_match(matchers, record):
        ... # (full code)
That makes sense, thanks for explaining how it handles path matching!
